title: Street works permit schemes conditions
body: "Guidance setting out the street works permit scheme conditions that highway authorities must follow if imposing conditions on permits.  The guidance applies from 5 January 2026.  It is used with the street works permit schemes regulations guidance and reflects the Street and Road Work Charges and Penalties Regulations 2025, which:   increased the level of fixed penalty notices for street works offences extended overrun charges to weekends and bank holidays where works extend beyond the agreed duration  "
